title: lippia deltata
intro: Lippia deltata, also known as Mexican oregano or Mexican lippia, is a perennial shrub native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lippia deltata include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and antiseptic properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, allowing for versatile use in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
